caption: A screen capture displays a financial trading interface featuring several identical panels of a candlestick stock chart. Each panel shows price movements with green and red candles, a moving average line, and technical indicators like MACD and Stochastic oscillators at the bottom. The text "Genko Shipping & Trading" is printed across the center of the charts. Various data points and labels are visible, including "L=24.69 -2.24 -8.32%" and "H=28.47 L=24.14". The x-axis marks time intervals, such as "Oct", "Apr", "Jul", and "Jan 13". The interface is densely packed with numerical values, grid lines, and labels like "MACD(12,26,9,1.1,1,UpColorDetail_..." and "Stochastic Slow (High,Low,Close,14,3,3,1.20,80)". Across the frames, the image remains static, showing no movement or changes in the data or the layout of the trading software.
